UsedLicenseKey.title: Used License Key
UsedLicenseKey.description: Tracks verified cryptographic license key signatures that have been used to prevent multi-instance replays.

signature.description: The cryptographic signature verified locally and uploaded for registration.

timestamp.description: The timestamp string associated with signature verification.

restaurantId.description: The unique registered name/ID of the restaurant POS.

syncedAt.description: Timestamp in ms of when the key was synchronized to Firestore.

SubscriptionSettings.title: Subscription Settings
SubscriptionSettings.description: Holds centralized licensing subscription settings for each POS.

restaurantId.description: The unique registered name/ID of the restaurant POS.

expiryDate.description: License subscription expiry date represented as a millisecond epoch.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp in ms of when settings were updated.

Restaurant.title: Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Represents the restaurant details and active licensing signature.

/used_license_keys/{signature}.description: Collection registering used licensing key signatures.

/subscriptionSettings/{restaurantId}.description: Collection tracking POS license subscription settings.

/restaurants/{restaurantId}.description: Collection tracking restaurant details and shared active licenses.
